title: "Dogs of The World and Lunar New Year" Commemorative Stamp Issue Order, 2009, SRO 6 of 2009
text:
2009 STAMP S.R.O. 6
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 6 OF 2009
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
Chapter 68:01.
(Gazetted 19th February, 2009)
1. This Order may be cited as the – Short title.
“DOGS OF THE WORLD AND LUNAR NEW
YEAR” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE
ORDER, 2009.
2. In this Order the word “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from the 15th day of December, 2008 to
Stamps.
the 14th day of March, 2009, both days inclusive, there shall be
issued throughout the State, special Commonwealth of Dominica
postage stamps (“DOGS OF THE WORLD AND LUNAR
NEW YEAR” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE) of
values and colours specified in Schedule I and the design specified
Schedule I.
in Schedule II.
Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to
Dies
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatsoever
of all stamps authorised by this Order, as soon as possible after
the 14th day of March, 2009.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into force on Commencement
the 15th day of December, 2008.

2009 STAMP S.R.O. 6
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
LUNAR NEW YEAR
1 Sheetlet @ $4.00 each Rose Lake, Lake, Brick Red,
Lemon, Drab, Pale Brown,
Chestnut
DOGS OF THE WORLD
1 Sheetlet @$10.00 Rose Lake, Chocolate,
Black; Cerise, White, Gray,
Slate, Orange Brown, Flesh
Single Stamp @$2.00 Green, Black, Emerald Green,
Tint
Single Stamp @$0.25 Pale Blue, Violet Blue,
Emerald Green, Tint, White
Single Stamp @$0.50 Enerald Green, Tint, Purple,
White, Gray
Single Stamp @$0.90 Deep Blue, Black, White,
Sepia, Enerald Green, Tint
Single Stamp @$1.00 Emerald Green, Tint, White,
Black
Single Stamp @$5.00 Emerald Green, Tint, Scarlet

2009 STAMP S.R.O. 6
SCHEDULE II
LUNAR NEW YEAR
1 Sheetlet of 4 stamps
at $1.00 each depicts An enraged Ox
DOGS OF THE WORLD
1 Sheetlet of 4 stamps
@$2.50 each depicts An Akita dog lying; an Australian
Cattle Dog standing; a Border Collie
with paws on top of a rope and a
Staffordshire Bull Terrier Cross Lying
Single Stamp @$0.25 A Dandie Dinmont Terrier
Single Stamp @$0.50 An Alaskan Malamute
Single Stamp @$0.90 A Welsh Springer Spaniel
Single Stamp @$1.00 A Pug
Single Stamp @$2.00 A Norfolk Terrier
Single Stamp @$5.00 A Vizsla
Made this 5th day of February, 2009.
CHARLES A. SAVARIN
Minister for Public Utilities.
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 20 cents)
